title: calonyction bona-nox
intro: Calonyction bona-nox, also known as the moonflower or night-blooming jasmine, is a tropical vine with beautiful white flowers that bloom at night and wilt by morning. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative and antispasmodic, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Calonyction bona-nox include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
